positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette of a majestic mountain range nestled under a sprawling, vibrant nebula sky. The composition is highly symmetrical and centrally focused, with the mountains forming a clean foreground silhouette against a gradient backdrop of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and luminous magenta. Include subtle, bioluminescent flora growing sparsely on the peaks. Style should be modern vector art mixed with ethereal celestial illustration. Use strong contrasts—pure black silhouettes against vivid, graded cosmic colors. Aspect ratio should emphasize the dramatic scale. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
